enrichment.summary: Kyle restarts vlogging after a long hiatus, catching up on his life in Boulder. He discusses his large ongoing Google Earth mapping project (ski resorts, ancient tribes, hot springs in Colorado), his fascination with Roman history as a blueprint for modern society, and his plan to spend the winter not working while finishing his website by end of 2017.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: treats it casually and intermittently, like a personal webpage, not a serious channel pursuit
believes he is doing something original that nobody else has done and wants to finish before someone beats him to it
sees Rome as a literal blueprint for all modern societies and believes causal analysis of Roman events can be applied to the present and future
believes present-day feelings and political archetypes (e.g. Trump) may stem from past lives in Rome
environmentally critical — prefers revamping scarred existing runs over building new ones
plans not to work, living off a $5,000 loan from his mother and proceeds from selling his car
revised estimate is end of 2017, not 2016 as previously stated

entities: Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
